allow: Bash(python -c "import zipfile; z=zipfile.ZipFile\('/tmp/bundle.zip'\); print\(z.namelist\(\)\); print\('--- macro.json ---'\); print\(z.read\('macro.json'\).decode\('utf-8'\)[:200]\)")
